boundary: Synthetic-only. Phase 0 opens no real/dev/validation/OOS data, imports no vendor adapter, computes no residual/z/beta/ADV/sector/eligibility, runs no metric, tunes no parameter, and never chooses a rule because it produces better results.
designation: MR-002 Workstream C — Signal & Data-Production Qualification (SPQ-1), Phase 0
frozen_input_identities: sector-ETF proxy mapping table (hash in evidence)
owner_accepted_clarifications_2026_07_20: beta FROZEN = market-beta coefficient beta_m of the §3 Step-2 residual regression (SIG-09)
registered_sigma_resid FROZEN = z-normalization sigma_i,t-1 (SIG-16); z/sigma single-pass consistency REQUIRED (SIG-17)
decision/execution seam REQUIRED: SignalDecisionRecord (no future fields) + ExecutionEnrichedCandidateRecord; FUTURE_INFORMATION_DETECTED (SIG-27)
frozen input identities REQUIRED: SPY, sector-ETF mapping+source, session calendar, price/return adjustment (SIG-30/31; SIGNAL_INPUT_IDENTITY_MISMATCH)
phase0_stop: Census + schemas + open-question register + draft qualification matrix ONLY. No production signal modules or tests. Owner rules the OPEN items (multiple rounds expected) before SPQ-1 implementation.
purpose: Implementation-binding specification/census for the upstream layer that PRODUCES the candidate facts Increment 3 consumes. Classifies every signal/candidate-production rule FROZEN / DERIVED_MECHANIC / OPEN / OUT_OF_SCOPE. No implementation; no real data; no residual/z/sigma/beta/sector/ADV computation.

refusal_taxonomy.INELIGIBLE:ADV_WINDOW_INSUFFICIENT: insufficient observations for the registered ADV window
refusal_taxonomy.INELIGIBLE:ELIGIBILITY_EVIDENCE_MISSING: a required eligibility evidence identity / availability timestamp is missing
refusal_taxonomy.INELIGIBLE:R5_WINDOW_INSUFFICIENT: fewer than 5 valid consecutive residuals for R5
refusal_taxonomy.INELIGIBLE:RETURN_INPUT_MISSING: a required return observation is missing (ineligible that day)
refusal_taxonomy.INELIGIBLE:SECTOR_PIT_IDENTITY_MISSING: no PIT-resolvable sector for the security at t (never defaulted)
refusal_taxonomy.INTEGRITY_STOP:BETA_INPUT_INVALID: beta regression inputs invalid (covered by OLS_DESIGN_SINGULAR when the same regression)
refusal_taxonomy.INTEGRITY_STOP:FUTURE_INFORMATION_DETECT: any post-decision-cutoff field or identity found in a SignalDecisionRecord
refusal_taxonomy.INTEGRITY_STOP:OLS_DESIGN_SINGULAR: the OLS design matrix is rank-deficient / singular
refusal_taxonomy.INTEGRITY_STOP:OLS_WINDOW_INSUFFICIENT: fewer than the exact 60 registered-session observations available
refusal_taxonomy.INTEGRITY_STOP:SESSION_CALENDAR_MISMATCH: session index / numbering diverges from the registered calendar
refusal_taxonomy.INTEGRITY_STOP:SIGMA_RESID_INVALID: registered_sigma_resid is not strictly positive and finite
refusal_taxonomy.INTEGRITY_STOP:ZSCORE_VARIANCE_INVALID: sigma_i,t-1 is zero or non-finite (z undefined)
refusal_taxonomy.INTEGRITY_STOP:ZSCORE_WINDOW_INSUFFICIEN: fewer than 60 complete overlapping R5 observations for mu/sigma
refusal_taxonomy.REFUSED_CODE_OR_DATA_IDENTITY:SECTOR_EFF: ambiguous / conflicting same-day PIT sector records
refusal_taxonomy.REFUSED_CODE_OR_DATA_IDENTITY:SIGNAL_INP: any frozen-input identity (SPY / sector-ETF mapping / sector source / session calendar / price-adjustment) mismatch

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Governed session index = registered snapshot session dates (AAPL/Sharadar SEP), 3400 sessions; session ordinals not calendar arithmetic (prereg windows_literal.calendar_authority, governed_session_list_sha256 b873421...).
rules.implementation_consequence: SPQ-1 binds the registered session index + governed_session_list_sha256; a mismatch -> SIGNAL_INPUT_IDENTITY_MISMATCH.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Signals computed AFTER the close of session t; entry at the t+1 official open; five-session time-stop at open of session 6; close-to-close execution diagnostic only.
rules.implementation_consequence: Decision cutoff = close of session t; no post-close-t observation may enter the decision record (SIG-33).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Signal returns = total-return-adjusted (splits+dividends); execution prices = split-adjusted, NON-dividend-adjusted open/close; gap filter = split-adjusted economically-adjusted for cash distributions; dollar-volume ranking = raw close x raw volume.
rules.implementation_consequence: SPQ-1 uses total-return-adjusted series for the residual model and raw close x raw volume for ADV; adjustment-identity mismatch -> SIGNAL_INPUT_IDENTITY_MISMATCH.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Mid-month universe departures run to normal exit, no new entries; delisting valuation priority order registered; survivorship-freedom mandatory (PIT membership, never a current constituent list).
rules.implementation_consequence: IPO entry boundary + how suspended/missing sessions inside the 60-session OLS window are counted is NOT fully specified -> owner question OQ-SPQ-01.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Rolling 60-session OLS on DAILY ARITHMETIC TOTAL returns; missing observation => ineligible that day; no winsorization.
rules.implementation_consequence: SPQ-1 builds daily arithmetic total returns (total-return-adjusted series); any missing return in the window -> ineligible / RETURN_INPUT_MISSING.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Any missing observation => ineligible that day (§3). Whether a missing interior session shortens/【voids】the 60-window is not spelled out.
rules.implementation_consequence: The exact handling of an interior missing session within the 60-session window (skip vs void vs shift) needs a ruling -> OQ-SPQ-02.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: For each sector ETF, rolling 60-session regression ENDING at t-1: r_Sector,t = a + beta_Sector*r_SPY,t + u_Sector,t; residual u_Sector,t is the sector-specific factor (beta_Sector from t-60..t-1 applied to day t).
rules.implementation_consequence: SPQ-1 Step 1 produces u_Sector,t from the frozen sector-ETF series + SPY; both are frozen input identities (SIG-30/31).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Rolling 60-session OLS on t-60..t-1 (never day t): r_i,t = alpha_i + beta_m,i*r_SPY,t + beta_s,i*u_Sector,t + eps_i,t; day-t residual from t-1 coefficient estimates; intercept included.
rules.implementation_consequence: SPQ-1 Step 2 emits eps_i,t (residual) and beta_m,i (SIG-09); window 60 ending t-1; intercept included.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: beta_i = beta-hat_m,i, the MARKET-beta coefficient of the same §3 Step-2 60-session stock regression that produces the residual (§5 beta-limit binds 'beta_i = each stock's §3 beta-hat_m'). Producer = SPQ-1 residual regression; benchmark = SPY; sector regressor = u_Sector; window 60 ending t-1; intercept included.
rules.implementation_consequence: beta is a by-product of the residual regression, NOT a separate model. No secondary beta estimation path is authorized.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: §3 does not specify the OLS solver, numerical tolerance, minimum rank/observation requirement, or singular-design handling.
rules.implementation_consequence: Solver, tolerance, min-rank, and singular-design behavior need a ruling -> OQ-SPQ-03 (OLS_DESIGN_SINGULAR refusal drafted).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: PIT sector mapping per V2; an unresolvable sector => excluded, never defaulted.
rules.implementation_consequence: A stock without a PIT-resolvable sector is INELIGIBLE (SECTOR_PIT_IDENTITY_MISSING); never assigned a default sector.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: R5_i,t = Sum_{k=0..4} eps_i,t-k (the five residuals through day t).
rules.implementation_consequence: SPQ-1 sums the 5 consecutive registered-session residuals ending at t; fewer than 5 valid residuals -> ineligible / R5_WINDOW_INSUFFICIENT.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: §3 defines the 5-sum but not the behavior when a residual in the 5-window is missing, nor the first eligible session, nor whether the 5 must be consecutive REGISTERED sessions.
rules.implementation_consequence: Missing-residual-in-R5 behavior + first-eligible-session + consecutiveness need a ruling -> OQ-SPQ-04.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: z_i,t = (R5_i,t - mu_i,t-1)/sigma_i,t-1; mu,sigma from rolling windows ENDING at t-1, exactly 60 complete overlapping five-day observations, ddof=1, no winsorization. Current R5_t is excluded (window ends t-1).
rules.implementation_consequence: One deterministic normalization pass yields mu_i,t-1, sigma_i,t-1, z_i,t; zero-variance/non-finite -> ZSCORE_VARIANCE_INVALID.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: registered_signal_value = z_i,t exactly (no clipping/flooring/winsorization/rank transform).
rules.implementation_consequence: SPQ-1 emits registered_signal_value = z_i,t; downstream Z_entry threshold + |z| ordering consume it (Increment-3 accepted, unchanged).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: registered_sigma_resid = sigma_i,t-1 = sample std (ddof=1) of the 60 complete overlapping R5 observations ending at t-1 = the z-normalization denominator. Current R5 excluded.
rules.implementation_consequence: SPQ-1 emits registered_sigma_resid = sigma_i,t-1 from the SAME normalization pass as z (SIG-14). Strictly positive + finite; no floor/imputation -> SIGMA_RESID_INVALID.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: registered_signal_value (z) and registered_sigma_resid (sigma) MUST derive from one deterministic normalization pass sharing the same mu/sigma window identity.
rules.implementation_consequence: Qualification must prove z and sigma_resid share the same normalization-window identity + computation record; the 1/sigma_resid weighting Increment 3 uses is exactly z's denominator.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Accept only (1) a genuine PIT sector/industry history OR (2) historically-effective SIC/NAICS via a FROZEN mapping table whose hash ships in the evidence package; no present-day backfill; survivorship-free.
rules.implementation_consequence: SPQ-1 binds the frozen sector-mapping-table hash; sector_id must be PIT + evidence-bound; mismatch -> SIGNAL_INPUT_IDENTITY_MISMATCH.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: §2/V2 requires PIT + a frozen mapping table but does NOT specify the effective-date rule, filing/publication availability timestamp, same-day multiple-record handling, predecessor/security succession, or symbol changes.
rules.implementation_consequence: Effective-date + availability-timestamp + same-day-conflict + succession mechanics need rulings -> OQ-SPQ-05 (SECTOR_EFFECTIVE_DATE_CONFLICT / SECTOR_PIT_IDENTITY_MISSING drafted).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Long entry (all at close t): z<=-Z_entry AND bottom 10% of long-eligible pool AND earnings-clearance AND no announced merger/split/delisting/major corporate action AND gap filter passes AND liquidity envelope. Short mirrors.
rules.implementation_consequence: SPQ-1 emits eligibility_status in {ELIGIBLE, INELIGIBLE} summarizing these; Increment 3 consumes, never recomputes.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Do not open a position when a PIT-known earnings announcement falls between the t+1 open and the max exit (open of session 6); revised-timestamp availability only; BMO/AMC conservative if indistinguishable.
rules.implementation_consequence: SPQ-1 marks INELIGIBLE on earnings-window overlap; requires PIT earnings-calendar availability timestamps (input identity).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Entry order cancelled at the t+1 open if |AdjOpen_t+1 / AdjClose_t - 1| >= 6% (distribution-adjusted).
rules.implementation_consequence: The gap filter is an EXECUTION-time (t+1) test -> it belongs to the enrichment step, NOT the decision record (SIG-33); it uses the t+1 open, unknown at decision cutoff.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Every exclusion needs an exact PIT rule + availability timestamp + lookback/exclusion window + precedence + refusal-vs-INELIGIBLE + evidence identity. §4 gives the rules but not all timing/precedence mechanics.
rules.implementation_consequence: Per-exclusion availability timestamp, precedence, evidence identity, and refusal-vs-INELIGIBLE mapping need rulings -> OQ-SPQ-06 (ELIGIBILITY_EVIDENCE_MISSING drafted).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.economic_meaning: Delisting / bankruptcy / halt / min-history / security-type / exchange
rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: §2/§4 touch delisting valuation + survivorship but do not fully census min-trading-history, security-type, exchange-eligibility, bankruptcy/halt status as PIT eligibility rules.
rules.implementation_consequence: These eligibility dimensions need explicit PIT rules + evidence identities -> OQ-SPQ-07.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Dollar-volume ranking = raw close x raw volume (consistent unadjusted pair). ADV lookback length, lag, min observations, and the exact ADV-dollar formula are NOT specified in §3/§4.
rules.implementation_consequence: ADV formula + lookback + lag + min-obs need a ruling -> OQ-SPQ-08 (ADV_WINDOW_INSUFFICIENT drafted). Raw close x raw volume is FROZEN as the pair.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Entries without a valid official opening price are cancelled; exits without one remain pending until the next available official regular-session open. Official open = split-adjusted non-dividend-adjusted t+1 regular-session open.
rules.implementation_consequence: The official next-open is a session-(t+1) fact; the producer may register a missing future open ONLY at the execution session, never at the decision timestamp.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: SignalDecisionRecord (decision cutoff = close t) must NOT contain official_next_open_price, actual_execution_session, or any post-close-t observation. The t+1 enrichment step appends the official opening-price fact + execution timestamp WITHOUT recomputing decision facts.
rules.implementation_consequence: Two structurally distinct records; the enriched record is the adapter seam into the CLOSED Increment-3 replay contract. Any post-cutoff field/identity in a decision record -> INTEGRITY_STOP:FUTURE_INFORMATION_DETECTED.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: permanent_security_id source, symbol-to-security mapping, ticker changes, share-class, mergers/successors, duplicate listings, ADR/common distinctions are not specified upstream.
rules.implementation_consequence: The permanent-security-id source + lineage rules need a ruling -> OQ-SPQ-09 (SECURITY_IDENTITY_AMBIGUOUS drafted). Survivorship-free PIT membership is FROZEN (§2).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: candidate_id is a record identity; the frozen tie-breaks use permanent_security_id (lexical). candidate_id must not silently replace the permanent security identifier.
rules.implementation_consequence: SPQ-1 emits both distinctly; the Increment-3 removal/drift tie-breaks bind permanent_security_id.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: The market factor is the SPY total-return series (Step-1 + Step-2 regressor r_SPY).
rules.implementation_consequence: SPY total-return series is a REQUIRED frozen input identity; mismatch -> SIGNAL_INPUT_IDENTITY_MISMATCH.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Sector factors = sector-ETF residuals u_Sector; the sector-ETF proxy mapping + source series must be the FROZEN mapping table whose hash ships in the evidence package.
rules.implementation_consequence: Sector-ETF proxy mapping table + source series are REQUIRED frozen input identities; mismatch -> SIGNAL_INPUT_IDENTITY_MISMATCH.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

status_legend.DERIVED_MECHANIC: a required deterministic consequence of frozen rules / an owner Phase-0 clarification
status_legend.FROZEN: explicit in the governing chain; the producer binds it
status_legend.OPEN: needs an owner ruling before SPQ-1 implementation (see open_questions)
